name: io.github.Evanciel/stellavault
description: Local-first MCP server: Claude searches, asks & drafts from your Obsidian vault. 21 tools, no keys.

environmentVariables.name: STELLAVAULT_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite vector DB. Optional — defaults to a per-vault path resolved from your .stellavault.json config or the current directory.
